rationale: The stated mechanism (universal eigenvalue-spacing statistics with level repulsion, GUE sine-kernel pair-correlation / Montgomery-Odlyzko law, gap probability vanishing linearly, independent of microscopic detail) denotes the same random-matrix level-spacing/level-repulsion machinery as the reference's Wigner-surmise eigenvalue statistics of large random Hermitian matrices, so mechanism_match is true. But analytic number theory is a specific branch of mathematics, a genuinely different field from nuclear physics, so field_match is false and the pair is not equivalent.
